The [[Dubrillion/Legends|Dubrillion]] '''superlaser facility''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]] in the midst of the [[Dubrillion Ocean|main ocean]] of [[Dubrillion/Legends|Dubrillion]].

==Characteristics==
An [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Superlaser/Legends|superlaser]] facility was located on [[Dubrillion/Legends|Dubrillion]], which was also immune to an aerial bombardment, as it was designed so its vital areas would not be able to be made targets in a bombardment. The facility also contained three shielded relay dishes for the laser's targeting system. However, even without the relay dishes, the superlaser's aim was accurate enough to attack its targets. The superlaser itself was powered by a turbine made of three turbines, the destruction of which would also result the facility's destruction. It was guarded by various [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]], [[missile droid]]s, and [[Imperial submarine/Legends|Imperial submarines]].

The superlaser facility featured three landing platforms arrayed around the center, where the superlaser bowl was. The platforms were guarded by [[All Terrain Scout Transport/Legends|All Terrain Scout Transports]] and [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] [[Squad/Legends|squads]] with [[E-Web heavy repeating blaster/Legends|E-Web heavy repeating blasters]]. Each landing platform featured an elevator to the lower level, which was circular and had featured transport tracks and overhead conveyors. Walkways from the lower level reached into the turbine area.

==History==
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the installation was part of a plot to destroy a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Convoy/Legends|convoy]] in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]. The Empire [[Mission to Destrillion|lured]] the [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] to [[Destrillion]] by slipping false information to Rebel intelligence of an Imperial outpost in the system. The fleet would have to pass through the Dubrillion system.

[[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] led a raid on the outpost during the ensuing [[Battle of Dubrillion (Galactic Civil War)|ambush]]. After disabling the superlaser relay dishes in a [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing]], [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] used a captured AT-ST to infiltrate the facility and used an [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT]] to destroy the inner power nodes, destroying the installation.

==Behind the scenes==
The superlaser appears in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike]]''.

*''[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron III: Rebel Strike]]'' {{1st}}
